title: cistanthe cabrerae
intro: Cistanthe cabrerae, also known as Cabrera's cistanthe or pink starflower, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of Peru and Chile. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cistanthe cabrerae are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach pain. Cistanthe cabrerae can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for a range of applications in herbal medicine.
